title: Software Engineer - Java SDET
description:
**Introduction: A Career at HARMAN Automotive**

**What You Will Do**
* Test Automation:
* Design and implement automated tests using Java and testing frameworks (e.g., JUnit, TestNG).
* Develop test frameworks and tools to support testing efforts.
* Manual Testing:
* Perform manual testing and exploratory testing to identify defects and improve test coverage.
* Collaborate with development teams to reproduce and resolve issues.
* Collaboration:
* Work closely with development teams to understand requirements and design test cases.
* Collaborate with QA engineers to develop and maintain test plans and test cases.
* Continuous Improvement:
* Identify areas for test process improvement and implement changes to increase efficiency and effectiveness.


**What You Need**
* 3 to 6 years of experience in software testing and development using Java.
* Strong knowledge of Java programming and testing frameworks (e.g., JUnit, TestNG).
* Experience with test automation tools (e.g., Selenium, Appium).
* Familiarity with Agile development methodologies and CI/CD pipelines.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills.


**Bonus Points**
* Experience with cloud\\-based testing platforms (e.g., AWS Device Farm, Sauce Labs).
* Knowledge of DevOps tools (e.g., Jenkins, Docker).
* Familiarity with containerization (e.g., Docker) and orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes).
* Certifications, such as ISTQB or Certified ScrumMaster.


**Skills To Enhance**
* Advanced test automation techniques and frameworks.
* Cloud\\-based testing and DevOps practices.
* Containerization and orchestration.
* Agile methodologies and Scrum.


**What We Offer**
* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Opportunities for professional growth and development
* Collaborative and dynamic work environment
* Access to cutting\\-edge technologies and tools
* Recognition and rewards for outstanding performance through BeBrilliant
* Chance to work with a renowned German OEM
* You are expected to work all 5 days in a week in office


**You Belong Here**
 HARMAN is committed to making every employee feel welcomed, valued, and empowered. No matter what role you play, we encourage you to share your ideas, voice your distinct perspective, and bring your whole self with you – all within a support\\-minded culture that celebrates what makes each of us unique. We also recognize that learning is a lifelong pursuit and want you to flourish. We proudly offer added opportunities for training, development, and continuing education, further empowering you to live the career you want.
   

  

**About HARMAN: Where Innovation Unleashes Next\\-Level Technology**
 Ever since the 1920s, we’ve been amplifying the sense of sound. Today, that legacy endures, with integrated technology platforms that make the world smarter, safer, and more connected.
   

  

 Across automotive, lifestyle, and digital transformation solutions, we create innovative technologies that turn ordinary moments into extraordinary experiences. Our renowned automotive and lifestyle solutions can be found everywhere, from the music we play in our cars and homes to venues that feature today’s most sought\\-after performers, while our digital transformation solutions serve humanity by addressing the world’s ever\\-evolving needs and demands. Marketing our award\\-winning portfolio under 16 iconic brands, such as JBL, Mark Levinson, and Revel, we set ourselves apart by exceeding the highest engineering and design standards for our customers, our partners and each other.
   

  

 If you’re ready to innovate and do work that makes a lasting impact, join our talent community today!

title: Software Engineer
description:

 Atrius, Distech Controls and QSC are part of the Acuity Intelligent Spaces (AIS) business segment. Our mission is to make spaces smarter, safer and greener through our strategy of connecting the edge with the cloud using disruptive technologies that leverage data interoperability.

Through our two business segments, Acuity Brands Lighting (ABL) and Acuity Intelligent Spaces (AIS), we design, manufacture, and bring to market products and services that make a valuable difference in people’s lives.

 The Senior Software Engineer will work with an experienced team of software, firmware, and hardware engineers to develop our Q\\-SYS platform.  This Position is based out of Bengaluru, India
   

  

**Responsibilities**

* Proficiency in several of the following areas:
+ OpenGL
+ OpenVINO
+ Qt
+ Communications protocols
+ Web technologies
+ Computer security and data privacy
+ Streaming media protocols
+ Real\\-time embedded systems

title: Software Engineer, Commerce Frontend
description:
**Company Overview**
 Docusign brings agreements to life. Over 1\\.5 million customers and more than a billion people in over 180 countries use Docusign solutions to accelerate the process of doing business and simplify people’s lives. With intelligent agreement management, Docusign unleashes business\\-critical data that is trapped inside of documents. Until now, these were disconnected from business systems of record, costing businesses time, money, and opportunity. Using Docusign’s Intelligent Agreement Management platform, companies can create, commit, and manage agreements with solutions created by the \\#1 company in e\\-signature and contract lifecycle management (CLM).
   

  

 What you'll do
   

  

 Docusign is looking for a highly motivated full stack Software Engineer to join our commerce platform team. This person will work in a close knitted development Pod of 4\\-6 engineers to develop, test, and support features and experimentation on ecom.docusign.com and adjacent experiences.
   

  

 The Commerce engineering team offers unique learning opportunities where you will be directly involved in end\\-to\\-end customer experience ownership across a large surface area of product and engineering collaboration. We look for candidates with love for computer science and engineering, and we truly believe you will enjoy and find success in this team.
   

  

 This position is an individual contributor role reporting to the Engineering Manager, Commerce Platform.
   

  

**Responsibility**
* Design and develop high\\-quality, user\\-focused experiences using React, Next.js and Node.js
* Build, maintain, and scale a robust component library to ensure UI consistency and reusability
* Write clean, maintainable, and well\\-documented code following industry best practices
* Develop and maintain comprehensive automated tests, including unit, integration, and end\\-to\\-end testing, to ensure reliability and stability
* Work within an Agile development environment, leveraging best practices like CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and effective code reviews
* Collaborate cross\\-functionally with designers, product managers, and backend engineers to create seamless user\\-facing applications
* Mentor and support other engineers within the organization, providing technical guidance and knowledge sharing
* Present software architecture and technical strategies to executives, influencing key decision\\-making
* Work as part of a cross\\-site development team to drive the design, implementation, testing, and release of products
* Identify and address potential technical risks proactively , performance bottlenecks, and usability issues before they impact product delivery
* Stay up\\-to\\-date with emerging technologies and industry trends to continuously improve the frontend ecosystem


 Job Designation
   

  

**Hybrid:** 
 Employee divides their time between in\\-office and remote work. Access to an office location is required. (Frequency: Minimum 2 days per week; may vary by team but will be weekly in\\-office expectation)
   

  

 Positions at Docusign are assigned a job designation of either In Office, Hybrid or Remote and are specific to the role/job. Preferred job designations are not guaranteed when changing positions within Docusign. Docusign reserves the right to change a position's job designation depending on business needs and as permitted by local law.
   

  

 What you bring
   

  

**Basic**
* Bachelor's or Master’s in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Information Systems, Informatics or equivalent experience
* 5\\+ years of software development experience in user\\-facing applications
* Strong expertise in JavaScript and TypeScript, with deep experience in modern ES6\\+ features
* Proficiency in React.js, Node.js, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Ajax, jQuery, and the latest frontend technologies
* Experience in consuming web services
* Experience using coding assistants \\- Github Copilot, Claude Code etc
* Proven track record of developing and shipping highly scalable, consumer\\-facing web applications
* Experience working in Agile environments, utilizing best practices for version control (Git), CI/CD workflows, and automated testing
* Knowledge of growth experimentation, A/B testing strategies, and data\\-driven UI optimization


**Preferred**
* Expertise in RESTful and GraphQL API integration
* Experience with Next.js for server\\-side rendering (SSR), static site generation (SSG) and working with micro\\-frontends
* Familiarity with cloud\\-based infrastructure (Azure) and cloud\\-native architecture
* Strong understanding of web accessibility (a11y), internationalization (i18n), telemetry, and experimentation frameworks
* Passion for frontend performance optimization, user experience, and maintainable architectures


 Life at Docusign
   

  

**Working here**
 Docusign is committed to building trust and making the world more agreeable for our employees, customers and the communities in which we live and work. You can count on us to listen, be honest, and try our best to do what’s right, every day. At Docusign, everything is equal.
   

  

 We each have a responsibility to ensure every team member has an equal opportunity to succeed, to be heard, to exchange ideas openly, to build lasting relationships, and to do the work of their life. Best of all, you will be able to feel deep pride in the work you do, because your contribution helps us make the world better than we found it. And for that, you’ll be loved by us, our customers, and the world in which we live.
   

  

**Accommodation**
 Docusign is committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities in our job application procedures. If you need such an accommodation, or a religious accommodation, during the application process, please contact us at accommodations@docusign.com.
   

  

 If you experience any issues, concerns, or technical difficulties during the application process please get in touch with our Talent organization at taops@docusign.com for assistance.

title: Computer Scientist
description:
**Job Description**
 Our company
   

  

 At Adobe, we’re changing the world. How? We give people the tools to bring their ideas to life and create content that makes life more fun and work more meaningful. We give businesses and organizations the power to truly engage their customers. We're the ones behind the gorgeously designed content that streams across your laptop, TV, phone, and tablet every day—and we’re the ones who harness the massive power of big data to help companies move from data to insight and insight to action by delivering content that people crave most. We’re a company that understands that product innovation comes from people innovation, and that’s why we invest in cultivating leaders throughout the organization. If you’re passionate about leading from where you sit, join us.
   

  

 What you’ll do:
   

  

* Prototype, develop, and unit\\-test scalable features in the highest quality

The ideal candidate is strong in frontend engineering but comfortable working across the stack to integrate APIs, deploy backend services, and ensure smooth end\\-to\\-end functionality.
* Strong proficiency in React (hooks, context API, state management) and solid working knowledge of at least one other modern framework, along with JavaScript (ES6\\+) and TypeScript
* Hands\\-on experience with frontend tooling and testing \\- including build tools (Webpack, Vite), CSS frameworks (Tailwind, SASS/SCSS, Styled Components), and testing libraries (Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress, or Playwright)
* Experience with browser\\-based debugging and performance testing software

* Excellent communication skills. Willingness to work under pressure. Hunger to learn and succeed in a fast\\-paced environment
* Working knowledge of agentic engineering tools and practices \\- including AI\\-assisted development tools (e.g., Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor), prompt engineering for code generation, and the ability to integrate and interact with LLM\\-based APIs or agent frameworks in frontend applications.

 Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call \\+1 408\\-536\\-3015\\.

title: Software Dev Engineer I, Amazon University Talent Acquisition

title: Software Development Engineer(OIC)
description:
**Company Overview**
 At Motorola Solutions, we believe that everything starts with our people. We’re a global close\\-knit community, united by the relentless pursuit to help keep people safer everywhere. We build and connect technologies to help protect people, property and places. Our solutions foster the collaboration that’s critical for safer communities, safer schools, safer hospitals, safer businesses, and ultimately, safer nations. Connect with a career that matters, and help us build a safer future.
   

  

**Department Overview**
 Our IT organization has a critical role in driving extraordinary business results. Through a strong partnership with other areas of our business, we bring innovative thinking to every conversation and deliver with integrity. We’re looking for people who bring great ideas and who make our partners’ ideas better. Intellectually curious advisors (not order takers) who focus on outcomes to creatively solve business problems. People who not only embrace change, but who accelerate it.
   

  

 We are seeking an IT professional who is passionate about the use of technology to achieve business goals. The ideal candidate is self\\-motivated, thrives on working across multiple teams, and can use technology to solve complex business problems.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Role Overview**
 We are seeking a seasoned Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC) Developer with at least 6 years of hands\\-on experience to lead our integration and automation initiatives. The ideal candidate must possess deep technical expertise in
 **OIC Generation 3** 
 , managing complex integrations. Unique to this role is a strong focus on hyper\\-automation; the candidate will not only design API\\-led integrations but also leverage
 **OIC’s native RPA \\& OCU document understanding capabilities** 
 to automate manual tasks. Experience with
 **UiPath** 
 is highly desirable to bridge our existing automation landscape.
   

  

**Required Qualifications**
* Experience: Minimum 6\\+ years of progressive experience in Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC) and SOA technologies.
* OIC RPA: Hands\\-on experience with Oracle Integration Cloud’s native RPA features (designing bots, recording workflows, and managing robot agents).
* Technical Skills: Strong proficiency in XML, XSLT, XPath, JSON, REST, SOAP, and JavaScript for complex data mapping and transformation.
* Certifications: Oracle Cloud Platform Application Integration Specialist certification (preferred).


**Preferred Qualifications (Nice To Have)**
* UiPath RPA: Experience developing bots in UiPath Studio and managing them via UiPath Orchestrator.
* Experience integrating with Oracle SaaS modules (Fusion ERP, HCM, SCM).
* Knowledge of Visual Builder Cloud Service (VBCS) or Process Cloud Service (PCS).


**Soft Skills**
* Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills for debugging complex hybrid (API \\+ RPA) workflows.
* Ability to communicate technical automation concepts to non\\-technical business stakeholders.
* Self\\-starter with the ability to lead migration projects independently.


 Basic Requirements
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* OIC Development \\& Architecture ( Gen 3\\)
* Design, develop, and deploy end\\-to\\-end integration solutions using Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC) Gen 3, ensuring high availability and error handling.
* Lead migration efforts from OIC Gen 2 to Gen 3, including refactoring integrations to utilize Gen 3’s project\\-based architecture and improved connectivity features.
* Configure and manage Oracle Cloud Adapters (ERP, HCM, SCM, Salesforce, REST/SOAP) to ensure seamless data flow between SaaS, PaaS, and on\\-premise applications.
* Implement complex orchestration patterns (synchronous/asynchronous) and lookups to map cross\\-functional business processes.
* Robotic Process Automation (OIC RPA)
* Identify opportunities for automation where APIs are unavailable and implement OIC Native RPA (Robots) to handle UI\\-based interactions.
* Design, record, and configure software robots within the OIC ecosystem to automate repetitive manual tasks (e.g., legacy system data entry, document scraping).
* Orchestrate hybrid workflows that combine API\\-based integrations with RPA bots to achieve end\\-to\\-end process automation.
* UiPath \\& Automation Strategy
* Preferred: Integrate OIC with UiPath orchestrators to trigger advanced external bots or consume UiPath processes within OIC flows.
* Assess existing UiPath automations for potential migration to OIC Native RPA to consolidate licensing and infrastructure where applicable.
* Integration \\& Workflow Automation
* Fusion ERP Integration: Build integrations using Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC) to map extracted JSON data (Vendor Name, Invoice Amount, Date) directly into Oracle Fusion ERP tables.
* API Orchestration: Develop Python scripts or OCI Functions to trigger the Document Understanding REST APIs whenever a new file lands in an Object Storage bucket.
* Exception Handling: Design workflows (using OCI Process Automation) that route "low confidence" extractions to a human manager for manual review before data is committed to the ledger.
* Operations \\& Monitoring
* Utilize OIC Observability tools to monitor integration health, troubleshoot failures, and optimize performance (specifically addressing Gen 3 performance tuning).
* Manage connectivity agents for on\\-premise integrations, ensuring secure communication tunnels.


 Travel Requirements
   

  

 None
   

  

 Relocation Provided
   

  

 None
   

  

 Position Type
   

  

 Experienced
   

  

 Referral Payment Plan
   

  

 Yes
   

  

***EEO Statement***
 Motorola Solutions is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion or belief, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status or any other legally\\-protected characteristic.
   

  

 We are proud of our people\\-first and community\\-focused culture, empowering every Motorolan to be their most authentic self and to do their best work to deliver on the promise of a safer world. If you’d like to join our team but feel that you don’t quite meet all of the preferred skills, we’d still love to hear why you think you’d be a great addition to our team.

description:
**Who You Will Work With**
 Cisco is transforming its platforms to run the next generation of cloud\\-native and multi\\-cloud services. This team builds tools and platforms that enable engineers to procure, manage, and optimize cloud infrastructure at scale across hybrid environments. While we work closely with infrastructure and platform operations, solving complex problems through software engineering is at our core. This role offers the opportunity to operate as a senior technical leader for software and AI\\-first platform transformation.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 You are a senior software engineer with deep technical breadth across architecture, software development, and operations. You lead through both execution and influence, shaping technical direction while enabling teams to deliver high\\-impact outcomes. You have substantial experience applying AI and machine learning to enterprise software and platform operations and can guide adoption patterns that are scalable, secure, and measurable.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
 As a Software Engineer, you will lead strategic platform automation and user\\-facing capabilities that improve reliability, scalability, and developer experience across Cisco IT cloud services. This role includes leading AI\\-enabled capabilities, including assistant or agent\\-driven workflows, intent\\-based interactions, and ML\\-enabled operational intelligence. You will drive major initiatives from concept through operation, partnering across product, platform, and engineering organizations.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead development of complex software capabilities that improve cloud platform reliability, scalability, security, and operational efficiency in a DevOps model.
* Define and implement AI\\-enabled platform patterns that improve user journeys and operational outcomes across services.
* Architect and guide implementation of cloud\\-native microservices and APIs in Kubernetes\\-based environments.
* Drive cross\\-organizational technical planning, architecture alignment, and delivery execution.
* Apply LLM/ML frameworks (for example LangChain, LangGraph, PyTorch, or TensorFlow) to enterprise\\-scale production use cases.
* Lead improvements in observability, resiliency engineering, and automation strategy.

**Minimum Qualifications**

* Strong experience with Kubernetes, containers, CI/CD, and DevOps/SRE\\-aligned operating models.

**Preferred Qualifications**

description:
**Job Description**
 We are Citi’s Application, Platform and Engineering group, a start\\-up with the exciting mission of shaping the direction of travel for the entire bank under the Chief Technology Office. We define the AI and engineering strategy for the bank. We are a team of talented engineers, product managers, and SMEs, taking ambiguous concepts and making them real by engineering cutting\\-edge products at planetary scale.
   

  

 We are solely focused on the most modern technology and engineering disciplines: generative AI, cloud\\-native architectures, security, modern app stacks, open\\-source, and the latest and greatest in the Kubernetes ecosystem.
   

  

 Generative AI is a rapidly evolving space. As a Staff Engineer, you will be the technical anchor and visionary for this domain. We ask that you share with us examples of projects that you have architected and scaled. Ideally, these examples should showcase clever distributed architectures, systematic evaluation of LLM behaviours at scale, and your ability to drive technical consensus across large organizations.
   

  

**Technical Skillset Required:**
 14\\+ Years of Hands on experience is a must have.
   

  

**Tech Skillsets required for the role** 
 :
   

  

 Go microservices, React 19\\+/TypeScript, OpenShift/Kubernetes, MongoDB/Redis/S3, REST/gRPC/WebSockets, Claude/Gemini/proprietary LLMs, OAuth/JWT/Vault, GitOps CI/CD, Prometheus/Grafana/ELK.
   

  

**You might be a good fit if you:**
* Bring distinguished, deep\\-dive software engineering expertise and a track record of architectural leadership.
* Thrive in a results\\-driven environment, where flexibility fuels impact and your technical decisions shape the enterprise.
* Are a game\\-changer and thought leader, ready to step beyond your designated role to influence the broader engineering culture.
* Love the synergy of pair programming and hands\\-on coding—you lead from the front and stay close to the codebase.
* Seize the opportunity to architect machine learning and GenAI applications at an unprecedented global scale.
* Possess a relentless passion to push the boundaries of machine learning and generative AI, bringing your knowledge to shape Citi’s future.


**What you’ll do within the team:**
* Engineering at scale: You will build scaled, robust services and platforms centred around generative AI. This may also include developing CLIs, SDKs, runtimes and more.
* Thought Leadership: Drive architectural vision and lead the 0\\-1 build of foundational, enterprise\\-grade AI platforms and products.
* System Design: Design and build high\\-quality, highly reliable, and secure distributed systems with developer and user experience at the center.
* Strategic Direction: Create "firsts" in the Generative AI space for Citi, acting as a core member of the team that defines the strategic technical direction for the entire bank.
* Scale \\& Iterate: Continually iterate and scale Generative AI products to handle massive throughput, whilst anticipating and listening to the complex needs of internal customers.
* Cross\\-Org Influence: You must be able to drive technical alignment across multiple engineering organizations, breaking down silos to deliver cohesive AI capabilities.


**Experience That Will Help You Succeed In This Role:**
* Mastery of Modern Stacks: Expert\\-level fluency in Golang is a must\\-have, with deep experience building concurrent, high\\-throughput systems. (Python is a strong desirable addition).
* Cloud\\-Native \\& Infrastructure: Deep expertise in the Kubernetes ecosystem, container orchestration, and modern security paradigms (e.g., Gatekeeper, zero\\-trust).
* Applied GenAI: Understanding of language models, fine\\-tuning methodologies, and RAG architectures, JIT context retrieval strategies will be useful.
* AI Infrastructure: Proven experience designing control planes, sandboxing systems for AI experimentation, and managing large\\-scale vector stores and search algorithms.
* Data Engineering: Extensive experience in large\\-scale ETL development and data pipeline architecture.
* Security \\& Governance: Experience maintaining and/or contributing to bug bounty, responsible disclosure programs, and AI safety/guardrail implementations.
* Startup Agility: Experience leading technical initiatives within fast\\-paced startup environments or driving startup\\-like agility within a large enterprise.


**What We Believe In:**
* We do not have boundaries between engineering and research; we expect our technical leaders to bridge the gap and contribute to both.
* We take a product\\-focused approach and care deeply about building solutions that are robust, scalable, and easy to use.
* We enjoy working in a fast\\-paced team tackling cutting\\-edge problems by constantly testing, learning, and adapting.
* We enjoy pair programming for our products; we are lean in our approach and actively remove bureaucracy where we see it.
* We believe in delivering fast, iterating, and pivoting as we go, rather than defining the perfect solution upfront.

title: Staff Engineer, Static Timing Analysis (STA)
description:
**(www.enchargeai.com)** 




 Staff Engineer, Static Timing Analysis (STA)
 



**Location: Greater Bengaluru Area (Hybrid\\-2 days office/3 days home)** 




  





**About Company:** 




**EnCharge AI is a leader in advanced AI hardware and software systems for edge\\-to\\-cloud computing. EnCharge’s robust and scalable next\\-generation in\\-memory computing technology provides orders\\-of\\-magnitude higher compute efficiency and density compared to today’s best\\-in\\-class solutions. The high\\-performance architecture is coupled with seamless software integration and will enable the immense potential of AI to be accessible in power, energy, and space constrained applications. EnCharge AI launched in 2022 and is led by veteran technologists with backgrounds in semiconductor design and AI systems.** 




  





  





**Staff Engineer: Static Timing Analysis (STA)** 




 We are seeking a high\\-caliber
 **Staff or Senior Staff Engineer** 
 to lead SOC Timing Convergence. This is a critical leadership role for a driven,
 **"go\\-getter"** 
 engineer who excels at navigating the complexities of modern, large\\-scale SOC designs. You will be the bridge between Architecture, RTL, DFT, and Physical Design to ensure a predictable, high\\-performance path to tape\\-out.
 



**The Role** 




 As a lead for SOC Timing or SubChip Timing, you will own the strategy for convergence. You will identify bottlenecks early in the design cycle ("left\\-shifting") and drive cross\\-functional alignment to meet aggressive Power, Performance, and Area (PPA) targets.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* **Timing Convergence Leadership:** 
 Drive full\\-chip SOC timing closure across all corners and modes (func, shift, capture, etc.).
* **Cross\\-Functional Coordination:** 
 Partner with
 **Architecture** 
 to validate timing feasibility,
 **RTL** 
 to optimize logic structures, and
 **DFT** 
 to streamline test\\-mode timing.
* **Left\\-Shift Strategy:** 
 Proactively identify and resolve structural timing issues, congestion, and high\\-latency paths early in the RTL/Synthesis phase to ensure predictable physical design execution.
* **Advanced Analysis:** 
 Perform complex timing tasks including
 **CPPR/CRPR** 
 analysis,
 **NoC** 
 (Network\\-on\\-Chip) timing, and constraint validation (SDC).
* **Automation \\& Agility:** 
 Architect and build sophisticated automation utilities (Tcl, Python, Perl) to accelerate timing sign\\-off, reduce manual audits, and improve schedule agility.
* **PPA Optimization:** 
 Drive best\\-in\\-class PPA by guiding physical design teams on floorplanning, clock tree synthesis (CTS) strategies, and placement optimizations.



**Requirements \\& Qualifications** 



* **Experience:** 
 7 to 10 years of hands\\-on experience in STA and Timing Closure on advanced process nodes (7nm, 5nm, or below).
* **Critical Thinking:** 
 Proven ability to debug complex timing violations, identify root causes (e.g., data\\-to\\-clock skew, crosstalk), and propose architectural or physical solutions.
* **Technical Mastery:** 
 \\* Expertise in industry\\-standard sign\\-off tools (e.g., PrimeTime, Tempus). Preferable Tempus tool.
* Deep understanding of
 **Multi\\-Mode Multi\\-Corner (MMMC)** 
 challenges and Hierarchical vs. Flat timing closure.
* Proficiency in SDC/CDC constraints.
* **Soft Skills:** 
 Strong leadership presence with the ability to influence cross\\-functional teams and drive execution in a fast\\-paced environment.
* **Education:** 
 B.Tech/M.Tech in Electrical/Electronics Engineering or a related field.



**Why Join Us?** 




 You will have the autonomy to define the timing methodology for next\\-generation silicon. This role offers the opportunity to tackle the industry's toughest frequency and power challenges while building the automation infrastructure that defines our engineering excellence.
 



  





***Contact***




 Uday
 



 muday\\_bhaskar@yahoo.com
 



***Mulya Technologies***




***"Mining the Knowledge Community"***

**About EnCharge AI:** 




  





 AI Compiler Engineer
 



 EnCharge AI is a leader in advanced AI hardware and software systems for edge\\-to\\-cloud computing. EnCharge’s robust and scalable next\\-generation in\\-memory computing technology provides orders\\-of\\-magnitude higher compute efficiency and density compared to today’s best\\-in\\-class solutions. **About the Role** 




 EnCharge AI is seeking a highly skilled and experienced AI Compiler Engineer to spearhead the efforts in developing and optimizing graph compilers tailored to cutting\\-edge AI and ML workloads. * Strong understanding of intermediate representations, code parsing, and semantic analysis in compiler design.
* Proficiency in C\\+\\+, Python, or other programming languages commonly used in compiler development.
* Open\\-source contributions to AI software frameworks and libraries is a plus
* Demonstrated experience leading and mentoring engineering teams with successful project delivery

**Mulya Technologies** 




**muday\\_bhaskar@yahoo.com**

title: Lead Engineer, Network (OT/SCADA)
description:
**About Fluence RMDC** 




 The Remote Monitoring \\& Diagnostics Center (RMDC) is Fluence’s global command center for ensuring 24/7/365 reliability, cybersecurity, and operational excellence across our Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) fleet. As energy storage complexity grows, strong SCADA and network expertise are essential for maintaining real\\-time visibility, secure communications, and resilient system performance.
 



  





**Position Summary** 




 The SCADA \\& Network Engineer supports global assets with advanced troubleshooting, secure network architecture oversight, SCADA signal reliability, and seamless integration between Fluence control systems and customer/TSO (transmission system operator) environments. This role combines operations, networking, OT cybersecurity, and SCADA engineering into a high\\-impact technical position.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Conduct advanced troubleshooting in Linux environments, focusing on services, system logs, and performance metrics to accurately isolate and document issues prior to escalation to Product teams.
* Identify and resolve complex technical issues at BESS sites, working with Linux systems, Cisco switches and firewalls, and ensuring secure and reliable communications.
* Oversee cybersecurity and patch management by administering network device updates, firmware patches, and validating the security of all deployments.
* Collaborate closely with software teams to evaluate vulnerabilities, verify updates, and guarantee secure deployment practices fleet\\-wide.
* Serve as the primary escalation contact for all SCADA, communications, server, and network challenges at operational BESS locations.
* Diagnose and address failures related to SCADA signals, communication breakdowns, network connectivity, cybersecurity alerts, and Linux/server service disruptions.
* Coordinate and support Field Service Engineers, commissioning teams, and other engineering specialists to facilitate effective issue resolution.
* Maintain comprehensive SCADA and network documentation, including architecture diagrams, signal lists, communication links, and backup and recovery strategies.
* Adhere strictly to change\\-management protocols for SCADA and network configurations.
* Assist in monitoring key performance indicators (KPIs), tracking compliance, and reporting on the reliability of SCADA and network systems.



  





**Technical Stack \\& System Expertise** 



* 8\\+ yrs of relevant OT / SCADA / Networking or IT experience.
* Familiarity with Git and Github
* Good networking skills, switching, routing and basic firewall knowledge, OSI model and Prudence model
* ISO 2700 and associated standards, NIS II and other country or regional cyber security standards
* Knowledge about SCADA protocols such as: Modbus \\& TCP/IP, Remote Terminal Units (RTUs), SEL Real Time Automation Controller (RTAC), SCADA Gateways \\& Data Concentrators, MQTT, Sparkplug B
* OPC\\-UA servers (Ignition).
* Basic knowledge in Linux based systems and commands. High\\-level programming languages such as Python or shell/bash scripting. Insights about Github
* Good communication skills
* English fluent
* German / other language skills desired
* Ticketing and incident management platforms (Salesforce, Jira).



  





**Shift \\& Team Structure** 



* **Located in Bangalore; operates in a 24/7 rotational shift model.**
* Supports global regions (Americas, EMEA, APAC).
* Works closely with RMDC engineers, SCADA specialists, controls teams, and commissioning engineers.



  





**Ideal Candidate Qualifications** 




  





**Education** 



* Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Engineering, Automation, IT, Computer Science, Electronics, or equivalent.



  





**Skills** 



* Strong real\\-time troubleshooting capability.
* Clear communication and solid documentation skills.
* Solution\\-oriented mindset with attention to cybersecurity and safety.
* Ability to interpret network diagrams, SCADA architectures, relay/RTU configs.



  





**Other Requirements** 



* Fluence safety training.
* Willingness to work rotational shifts.
* Ability to support field teams remotely when needed.



  





**PREFERRED** 



* Certifications a plus (RHCSA, RHCE, CCNA, CISSP, or equivalent).
* Experience in industrial control systems, BESS, or other mission\\-critical hardware/software systems.
* Experience in BESS, renewable energy, or related fields
* Familiarity with ITIL/ITSM process.



  





**Why Join RMDC as a SCADA \\& Network Engineer?** 



* Work at the intersection of OT, IT, networking, and energy storage operations.
* Critical role in ensuring secure and reliable BESS performance.
* Exposure to advanced SCADA, networking, and renewable energy systems.
* Strong global collaboration and career growth opportunities.
